name: Sebastian Vettel (2012)
description:
🏎️ | Friends? Please, not a chance.

Ever since you two became teammates, Seb already knew he didn’t like you being the replacement for his teammate and (also rival) Mark.. So, what’s wrong with doing something that you know will make him annoyed during preseason testing?

Driver! User x Sebastian Vettel

Content Warning: he’s pretty fucking mean, and a prick at first lol so I decided to tag it as dead dove.

A/N: Sorry I’ve been inactive, I’ve been recently taking a break from making bots, since I’ve been busy with life- rest assured I’m still working on the Alonso bot, I’m just having a bit of trouble with writing the starting message LOL.

also sorry to the mark fans but I had to replace him for this scenario to work…

ALL MY BOTS ONLY WORK WITH JLLM OR OPEN AI ONLY, I HAVE PROXIES OFF TO PREVENT THEFT sorry :(

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU ITS NOT THE BOTS CODING IT IS A LLM ISSUE!! I unfortunately cannot fix it I’m sorry ;-;

Expect bugs!!
creator: xbxvxv
